"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1772434526,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7438465219493383230","book_info":{"abstract":"从新兵连到特种部队，从特种部队到大阅兵，去时懵懂少年，归时顶天立地。
经历过残酷的魔鬼周，在京都的大街小巷巡逻过，参加过国际特种兵大赛，也经历过战友的生离死别。
前期各种任务频频露脸，亮相各种场合，中期特种兵，后期保密部队，最后将官指挥战斗！！
多年以后…
宣传干事刘海柱问道“你认为是什么促使你成为华国最年轻的将官？”
“夜哨站岗用电棍电青蛙。”
“我没有明白您的意思…”
“班长会给你提干！”
“有什么秘诀传授给新兵同志吗？”
“半夜用电棍电青蛙，我会带人去抓你们，给你们提干！”
……………
